summary: David, what a week! You've now lost 57.7 pounds total and dropped 5.3 pounds over the last two weeks—that's a solid 2.65 pounds per week, which is exactly the kind of sustainable pace we're aiming for. Your consistency is really paying off, and it's clear your Mounjaro is working well with your effort. One thing I'd love to see next week is a few more logging days—you captured 8 out of 14, and those extra data points help us spot patterns and keep momentum going. You're nearly 60 pounds down from where you started, David. That's genuinely impressive work, and you should feel proud of how you're showing up for yourself.
